name: claude-skills
description: 15 Claude Code skills distilled from real infrastructure and maker work. Covers self-hosted stack: MikroTik RouterOS (firewall, QoS, WireGuard), Proxmox, K3s, Cloudflare Tunnel, Docker Swarm, Grafana/Prometheus, FastAPI, Next.js, network engineering, Linux admin. Plus digital fabrication: CAD design (Fusion 360, Onshape), 3D printing (FDM, slicing), and laser cutting/engraving (LightBurn). Production patterns, known pitfalls, anti-patterns. No credentials or environment-specific config.

plugins.name: mikrotik-routeros
plugins.description: MikroTik RouterOS — firewall chains (RAW/filter/mangle/NAT), Queue Tree/PCQ bandwidth management, VLAN bridge-filtering, WireGuard VPN, CAPsMAN wireless, OSPF/BGP routing, scripting

plugins.name: proxmox-homelab
plugins.description: Proxmox VE — VM/LXC management, Ceph RBD/CephFS, HA manager, SDN/VXLAN, PBS backup, pvesh automation

plugins.name: k3s-kubernetes
plugins.description: K3s — Deployments, Traefik IngressRoute, ConfigMaps/Secrets, PVCs, private registry, rolling updates, debugging

plugins.name: cloudflare-tunnel
plugins.description: Cloudflare Tunnel — zero-trust public exposure, K3s HA deployment, DNS automation, config management, no open ports

plugins.name: wireguard-vpn
plugins.description: WireGuard VPN — server/client config, hub-and-spoke, road-warrior, multi-WAN asymmetric routing fix, MTU tuning

plugins.name: docker-swarm
plugins.description: Docker Swarm — stack deploy, immutable config/secret versioning, placement constraints, rolling updates, overlay networks

plugins.name: network-engineer
plugins.description: Network engineering — OSI troubleshooting methodology, BGP/OSPF, Cisco IOS patterns, interface counters, VLAN design, Netmiko automation

plugins.name: grafana-prometheus
plugins.description: Grafana + Prometheus monitoring — dashboard design, PromQL, alerting rules, exporters (node/blackbox/snmp), WireGuard peer metrics

plugins.name: linux-server-admin
plugins.description: Linux server administration — systemd units/timers, disk management, network config (netplan/nmcli), firewall (ufw/iptables), fail2ban, log analysis

plugins.name: python-fastapi
plugins.description: FastAPI backend patterns — async routes, Pydantic models, Postgres with asyncpg, JWT auth, background tasks, Docker deployment

plugins.name: nextjs-deployment
plugins.description: Next.js deployment — standalone output, Docker/K3s deploy, static asset gotchas, PM2, environment variables, CI/CD with GitHub Actions

plugins.name: context-engineering
plugins.description: Context engineering — context window mechanics, compression strategies, degradation patterns, multi-agent coordination, tool design, harness engineering

plugins.name: thai-dev-workflow
plugins.description: Pragmatic homelab dev workflow — K3s-first deployment policy, Git patterns, stack selection, monitoring, backup strategy for resource-constrained environments

plugins.name: cad-design
plugins.description: CAD design with Fusion 360 and Onshape — parametric sketching, constraints, 3D bodies, assemblies, CAM toolpaths, and export to STL/STEP/DXF for 3D printing, laser cutting, and CNC

plugins.name: digital-fabrication
plugins.description: 3D printing (FDM, Orca Slicer, Snapmaker) and laser cutting/engraving (LightBurn) — material profiles, slicer settings, print troubleshooting, power/speed tables, kerf calibration, safety
